title: Chapra Christ Church
tagline: Chapra Christ Church — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: Chapra Christ Church, commonly known as Chapra Church, is one of the oldest Christian churches in Nadia district of India.
overview.description: Chapra Christ Church, commonly known as Chapra Church, is one of the oldest Christian churches in Nadia district of India. It is located in Chapra in the Indian state of West Bengal. The church was established by the Church Missionary Society in the 1830s, with its building being constructed in 1840. It is overseen by the Diocese of Barrackpore of the Church of North India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chapra Christ Church?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chapra Christ Church is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chapra Christ Church?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (97 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (107 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chapra Christ Church?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chapra Christ Church at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chapra Christ Church?
faq.a: Stays in Chapra Christ Church start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chapra Christ Church?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chapra, Nadia (community development block), Chapra, Nadia, Bangaljhi, Harindanga, Nadia.
